creator: michele@possamai.nl
text:
(In reply to mikhail.maximov from comment #22)
Ah. Now I understand. I didn't know that. Thanks.  

This doesn't change my opinion though that it's wrong that we now have a broken port (and pkg) on supported and updated software versions for the sake of not breaking systems that have been EOL for over a year.

That's the wrong way around I think.
